title: Cats Expanded
description: [Fabric] Adds more gameplay to cats & adds catears
body:
Vanilla+ mod for everyone who likes cats 🐱.

# HALLOWEEN UPDATE
- Carved Cat Pumpkin (Recipe: Carved Pumpkin surrounded by 8x Catnip)
- Cat O'Lantern (Recipe: Carved Cat Pumpkin + Torch)

# Features
- Adds catears (new 3D model, 17 colour variants)
- Adds catnip + catnip bushes     
  - Feeding cats/ocelots catnip makes them go zooooom (they also eat from catnip bushes)     
  - Feeding Creepers catnip makes them flee from players. This doesnt stop them from exploding, so be careful!     
  - can be used on composters and bees will pollinate them (similar to sweet berry bushes)
- Adds option to allow cats to spawn outside of villages


# Installation
1. Install Fabric
2. Navigate to your .minecraft folder (in the MC launcher select the "installation" header and click the file icon next to your fabric installation)
3. Download matching version of the mod and place the .jar file in .minecraft/mods
4. Play :)

 

# Supported Languages
- English
- German
- Chinese (Simplified)


# Other Contributors
- Hiko (catear variants)
- YukisawaNya / 雪沢 坊洛 (chinese translation)


# Modpacks
This mod can be used in modpack   
-> contact me and i might promote it here :)
